title: FINANCIAL EDUCATION CLASSES - 211info
text: HILLSBORO MULTI-SERVICE CENTER FINANCIAL EDUCATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of financial education classes covering topics such as understanding banking services, short- and long-term financial planning and stability, building and repairing credit, and understanding the basics of retirement planning. All classes are online through Zoom. 1001 SW Baseline Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Visit website for current class schedule. Email (503) 726-0823 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (503) 726-0823 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 57 Services: Financial Literacy Training Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HOUSING/SHELTER - COMMUNITY CONNECT HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REPAIR ASSISTANCE FOR BEAVERTON RESIDENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTER SUPPORT PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY CONSERVATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOUSING FAMILY ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES MATERIAL GOODS - SENIOR PORTABLE AC UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
